caption: A group of practitioners performs a synchronized martial arts routine with long staffs in a spacious, brightly lit indoor hall featuring a large chandelier and a blue floor. Most performers wear matching blue uniforms with white trim, while one central figure wears white and another on the right wears black. In the initial sequence, the practitioners hold their staffs aloft, moving through a series of coordinated strikes and stances. The person in white leads the center, shifting from a high strike to a balanced stance. As the sequence progresses, they transition into a lunging position, swinging the staffs downward in unison. The background shows a seated audience watching the demonstration. The movement is fluid and disciplined, with the practitioners maintaining a consistent formation as they transition through the various poses of the routine.
